_comment: Refactor-campaign architecture-fitness ceiling (W2-T3, MASTER-PLAN §3A/§5). Captured from a real `depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type json` run's summary.violations.length (the forbidden-rule hit list -- W1-T26's lib-no-spike-or-cli rule today). Zero violations at capture time; a refactor PR that introduces one must go CI-red on scripts/refactor-campaign.mjs's check mode, on top of (not instead of) the depcruise CI job's own unconditional gate (W1-T26). Never raise this number to make a refactor PR pass -- lower it only when a genuinely-resolved violation drops the count.
